overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves smoothly along an elevated walkway overlooking a multi-lane street, transitioning into a commercial plaza with palm trees and the prominent KENDACHI building. Wet pavement reflects vibrant cyan and red neon signs against towering glass skyscrapers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings, overlooking the traffic below

entered.detail: large colorful holographic advertisement sign floating between buildings with purple and blue colors
multi-lane road below the walkway with moving vehicle lights and wet reflective asphalt
transparent safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents towering in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high elevated walkway overlooking a futuristic highway at night. The DTR holographic sign glows prominently in the distance while sparse traffic moves along the wet streets below. Glass railings line the walkway as the camera moves forward through the canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pedestrian plaza with commercial frontage

events.description: walkway curves right moving from highway overlook into sheltered commercial plaza area
palm trees and outdoor dining furniture become visible along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: following the curved walkway as it bends rightward, moving deeper into the commercial district

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage with white lettering on dark background mounted on building facade
tall tropical trees lining the plaza walkway with fronds silhouetted against building lights
tables with umbrellas arranged on the plaza in front of the KENDACHI building

segments.scene_description: The walkway curves right, transitioning from the open highway overlook into a more sheltered commercial plaza. The KENDACHI building sign emerges prominently on the right, accompanied by palm trees and outdoor dining furniture. The highway disappears from view as the path leads deeper into the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza in front of KENDACHI headquarters with outdoor seating

events.description: camera slows slightly while approaching the illuminated KENDACHI building entrance area

agents.ego_description: walking past palm trees toward the KENDACHI building, observing the wet pavement reflections

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the KENDACHI building at closer range, with the palm trees and outdoor seating now prominent in the near field. The wet plaza tiles reflect the cyan and red neon lights from the surrounding architecture. The camera maintains a steady walking pace through the empty, atmospheric commercial plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high elevated overlook of a futuristic highway into the intimate, neon-lit atmosphere of a commercial plaza. It begins on a walkway lined with glass railings, moving forward through a canyon of skyscrapers while a DTR holographic sign glows over the wet streets below. As the walkway curves to the right, the open highway view disappears, transitioning the scene into a sheltered urban space where palm trees and outdoor dining furniture emerge. The camera then shifts its focus toward the prominent KENDACHI building, moving closer to the architecture as the wet plaza tiles begin to reflect vibrant cyan and red neon lights. Finally, the movement maintains a steady pace through the empty, atmospheric plaza, fully immersed in the glow of the surrounding city.
